'''Von-Alai''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Von-Alai system/Legends|Von-Alai system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]], polluted by [[Kontag]] factories.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]'' {{1st}}
